evals.prompt: What's the cheapest petrol near Newtown?
evals.expected_output: Runs fuel_prices.py with --location 'Newtown' and presents cheapest fuel prices in plain text format with map links
Runs fuel_prices.py with --postcode 2042 --fuel-type E10 --radius 10 and shows top 3-5 stations sorted by price
Asks the user for their location before running the script — does not silently use IP geolocation
assertions: does not run script without location
